mnemonics.title: SMART Requirements
mnemonics.content: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Traceable - qualities of effective requirements

mnemonics.title: MoSCoW Prioritization
mnemonics.content: Must have, Should have, Could have, Won't have - categories for requirement prioritization

mnemonics.title: FURPS+ Classification
mnemonics.content: Functionality, Usability, Reliability, Performance, Supportability - plus constraints and other factors for categorizing requirements
